name: Pylontech Battery
description: The Pylontech component allows you to pull data from Pylontech Batteries into ESPHome. It uses [UART](https://esphome.io/components/uart) for communication.

config_entries.label: Update Interval
config_entries.description: The interval to check the sensor. Defaults to `60s`.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The id to use for this Pylontech component.
